Event Name: Hamburg University of Technology visits UNSW
University of Calgary / Haskayne School of Business Delegation Visit
Notes:
Reason for visit: To explore the potential for a strategic partnership between UNSW Business School and the University of Calgary, with a focus on developing deeper, high‑quality collaboration in research and student exchange, building on existing people‑to‑people relationships.


Key discussion points: Strong alignment in impact‑driven research priorities including AI in business, healthcare, FinTech, quantum computing, and workplace health and wellbeing; shared interest in research translation, industry engagement models (e.g. PRAxIS Lab), and trust‑building with external partners.


Outcomes and follow‑up: Agreement to progress discussions around pilot research collaborations supported by seed funding, explore PhD exchange or linked PhD pathways as an initial mobility initiative, and identify academic leads to formalise and scale collaboration at an institutional level.

Event Name: Hong Kong Metropolitan University Delegation Visit

Notes: Yu Loon Wong is the executive director and deputy group CEO of Boustead Singapore, and also a huge donator to UNSW Founders
